name: STAND OUT VR : VR Battle Royale
short_description: Kill, build, drive, do parkour, fly, make friends, eat... Compete to be the last man alive on huge islands filled with deadly weapons and vehicles. Play the way you want, this is Battle Royale.
detailed_description:
KILL, BUILD, DRIVE, DO PARKOUR, MAKE FRIENDS, PILOT, EAT.

Stand Out thrusts you headfirst into a relentless battle for supremacy, custom-made for those who live for the battleground. Imagine descending from the heavens, parachute billowing in the wind, as you touch down on a sprawling island ripe for exploration. Your mission: unearth the weaponry and gear necessary for an epic struggle to stay alive.
Utilize high-speed vehicles to traverse the battlefield with unparalleled agility. But beware! The omnipresent, deadly force field relentlessly encloses the arena, forcing combatants into a deadly dance of survival and elimination. As the tension escalates, the last warrior standing will claim victory and eternal glory. Will it be you?




Our game has been meticulously crafted to deliver the quintessential VR combat showdown. It boasts an extensive array of weapons that cater to every imaginable fighting style, ranging from razor-sharp blades to precision sniper rifles.

Immerse yourself in the adrenaline-pumping action across three meticulously crafted maps, each inspired by real-world locations. These environments will thrust you into epic combat scenarios, whether you find yourself amidst dense forests, expansive plains, desolate abandoned towns, or even a chilling nuclear site. Brace yourself for an unparalleled combat experience that spans the spectrum of warfare landscapes.



Prepare to navigate treacherous trenches, strategically evading enemy fire as you crawl through the mud. Ascend the crumbling ruins to secure a vantage point that offers a clear line of sight, giving you the edge in the battle ahead. Engage in heart-pounding gunfights that will see you chasing down your opponents on winding mountain roads, with motorcycles and cars serving as your adrenaline-fueled steeds.

In this relentless battle, victory demands unwavering determination. You must be willing to employ any means necessary to emerge as the triumphant survivor.

Embrace the cycle of life, death, and growth as you embark on this journey. Each defeat becomes a lesson, each setback a stepping stone toward becoming the ultimate last man or women standing. Will you have what it takes to rise to the top of the leaderboard?

This Is Battle Royale.

supported_languages:
English*, French*, Simplified Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
